articles.title: Solana surpasses Ethereum in weekly transaction fees for the first time in history
articles.description: Data from Blockworks revealed that, in the July 22nd week, Solana surpassed Ethereum in total weekly transaction fees for the first time in history. Solana recorded approximately $25 million in transaction fees, while Ethereum recorded roughly $21 million.

articles.title: Solana Surpasses Ethereum in Fees After Beating BNB — Will SOL Flip ETH?
articles.description: The Solana layer-1 blockchain has flipped Ethereum in total weekly fees just days after surpassing BNB to emerge as the fourth-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. Crypto researcher Dan Smith on X revealed that Solana hit $25 million in total fees last week compared to the $21 million on the Ethereum blockchain. Last week marked the […]

articles.title: Solana overtakes Ethereum in weekly fee revenue for the first time
articles.description: Solana surpassed Ethereum in total fees and MEV tips for the first time in a weekly timeframe since its launch. According to Blockworks Research, Solana generated approximately $25 million in revenue during the week of July 22, edging out Ethereum’s $21 million. SOL was trading at $185.8 as of press time amid the wider market […]

articles.title: Solana-based PayPal stablecoin supply closes gap on Ethereum PYUSD
articles.description: After launching in May, supply of PYUSD on Solana has nearly caught up with the supply of PYUSD on Ethereum.

articles.title: Solana’s daily volume suddenly outpaces Ethereum, going over $2 billion – here’s why
articles.description: Solana's decentralized exchanges (DEXs) are stealing the spotlight, with trading volumes that would make even Ethereum blush. What's behind this sudden surge? It's all about the dogs or one particular Shiba Inu, to be precise.Solana's DEX trading volume hit a whopping $2 billion in the last 24 hours, according to DefiLlama data. articles.title: Cardano Price Breakout? Chang Hard Fork Could Send ADA Prices Soaring
articles.description: Over the past 24 hours, the Cardano price has seen a modest 1.45% gain amid wider market growth. Notably, following the highly anticipated Chang hard fork launch, traders are eyeing a £5 Cardano.
